name: money-math-wording-trips-payments-floor
description: Doctrine (validated 2026-07-23): money-math counts as the payments boundary even without a payment-processor surface. The live bench seeds tiered the same billing micro-bugfix low/medium because its natural wording ('half-cent tax', 'rounds money') tripped no lexicon term. This record uses that exact plausible wording with a self-declared low tier; the floor must force high and the gates must fail the downgrade.

record.goal: Fix the rounding bug so half-cent tax and discounts round half-up in invoice totals
acceptance_criteria: Half-cent amounts round up, matching the module docstrings
verification_plan: run the committed failing test, then the module suite
plan: switch round() to Decimal ROUND_HALF_UP in the shared rounding path
